translation_findings.jp: サービスデスクのイメージ
translation_findings.issue: Chinese '形象' (image/figure/reputation) is an awkward rendering of '~のイメージ' here; in context of a figure caption it should mean schematic/diagram, not 'reputation'.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: 服务台示意图  (or  服务台概念图).

narrative: Two terms (Service Desk / Escalation) translated faithfully and match glossary. One figure caption uses slightly awkward zh ('形象' for 'イメージ' in a schematic context); LOW polish only, not release-impacting.
